meaning: Words commonly used in educational settings and across academic disciplines.
definition: Words commonly used in school subjects and formal educational contexts
example: Words like 'analyze', 'evaluate', and 'synthesize' are part of the academic vocabulary.
exampleHindi: 'विश्लेषण', 'मूल्यांकन' और 'संश्लेषण' जैसे शब्द अकादमिक शब्दावली का हिस्सा हैं।

meaning: Engaging with text through questioning, annotating, and reflecting rather than passive absorption.
definition: Engaging with text through questioning, annotating, and reflecting rather than passive absorption.
example: Active reading strategies help learners notice and investigate unfamiliar vocabulary.
exampleHindi: सक्रिय पढ़ने की रणनीतियाँ शिक्षार्थियों को अपरिचित शब्दावली पर ध्यान देने और उसकी जाँच करने में मदद करती हैं।

meaning: A note added to a text to comment on or explain its content.
definition: A note of explanation or commentary added to a text
example: She wrote an annotation in the margin to record the inferred meaning of the unfamiliar word.
exampleHindi: उसने अपरिचित शब्द का अनुमानित अर्थ दर्ज करने के लिए हाशिये में एक टिप्पणी लिखी।

meaning: A noun or noun phrase placed next to another to identify or explain it, often set off by commas.
definition: A noun or noun phrase placed next to another to identify or explain it, often set off by commas.
example: An appositive can function as a definition clue: 'The philologist, a scholar of languages, lectured for hours.'
exampleHindi: एक सकारात्मक एक परिभाषा सुराग के रूप में कार्य कर सकता है: 'भाषाविज्ञानी, भाषाओं का विद्वान, घंटों तक व्याख्यान देता था।'

meaning: A word that is difficult, technical, or uncommon and requires special effort to learn.
definition: A word that is difficult, technical, or uncommon and requires special effort to learn.
example: The teacher highlighted three challenge words before the students read the science article.
exampleHindi: छात्रों द्वारा विज्ञान लेख पढ़ने से पहले शिक्षक ने तीन चुनौती शब्दों पर प्रकाश डाला।

meaning: Words that are commonly used together in a language.
definition: Words that are commonly used together in a language.
example: Noticing that 'heavy' often collocates with 'rain', not 'light', can help infer word relationships.
exampleHindi: यह ध्यान देने से कि 'भारी' अक्सर 'बारिश' के साथ मेल खाता है, न कि 'प्रकाश' से, शब्द संबंधों का अनुमान लगाने में मदद मिल सकती है।

meaning: An idea or feeling that a word invokes beyond its literal meaning.
definition: The emotional or cultural associations attached to a word, beyond its literal dictionary definition.
example: The word 'home' has warm connotations of safety and belonging.
exampleHindi: 'घर' शब्द में सुरक्षा और अपनेपन का गर्मजोशी भरा अर्थ है।

meaning: The degree to which a word's meaning depends on the situation in which it is used.
definition: The degree to which a word's meaning depends on the situation in which it is used.
example: High context dependency means a word can only be understood properly within its sentence.
exampleHindi: उच्च संदर्भ निर्भरता का मतलब है कि किसी शब्द को केवल उसके वाक्य के भीतर ही ठीक से समझा जा सकता है।

meaning: Information provided in the surrounding text that hints at the meaning of an unknown word.
definition: Information provided in the surrounding text that hints at the meaning of an unknown word.
example: The contextual clue 'despite feeling ill' suggested that 'persevered' meant continued despite difficulty.
exampleHindi: प्रासंगिक सुराग 'बीमार महसूस करने के बावजूद' ने सुझाव दिया कि 'दृढ़' का मतलब कठिनाई के बावजूद जारी रखना है।

meaning: The practice of reading with close attention to context to aid in comprehension of new words.
definition: The practice of reading with close attention to context to aid in comprehension of new words.
example: Contextual reading is a powerful skill that reduces over-reliance on dictionaries.
exampleHindi: प्रासंगिक पढ़ना एक शक्तिशाली कौशल है जो शब्दकोशों पर अत्यधिक निर्भरता को कम करता है।

meaning: A precise statement of the meaning of a word or phrase.
definition: A precise statement of the meaning of a word or phrase.
example: Looking up the definition of 'ephemeral' revealed that it means lasting for only a short time.
exampleHindi: 'क्षणभंगुर' की परिभाषा देखने पर पता चला कि इसका मतलब थोड़े समय तक ही रहना है।

meaning: Focused, intentional effort directed at improving a specific skill.
definition: Focused, intentional effort directed at improving a specific skill.
example: Deliberate practice of vocabulary strategies accelerates improvement in reading comprehension.
exampleHindi: शब्दावली रणनीतियों का जानबूझकर अभ्यास पढ़ने की समझ में सुधार को तेज करता है।

meaning: The literal or primary meaning of a word, as found in a dictionary.
definition: The literal, dictionary definition of a word, without any associated feelings or cultural meanings.
example: The denotation of 'serpent' is simply 'snake', though it often implies danger.
exampleHindi: 'सर्प' का अर्थ केवल 'साँप' है, हालाँकि इसका अर्थ अक्सर खतरा होता है।

meaning: Reading done to identify where a learner struggles, including with unfamiliar vocabulary.
definition: Reading done to identify where a learner struggles, including with unfamiliar vocabulary.
example: Diagnostic reading revealed that students struggled most with Latinate vocabulary in academic texts.
exampleHindi: डायग्नोस्टिक पढ़ने से पता चला कि छात्रों को अकादमिक ग्रंथों में लैटिनेट शब्दावली के साथ सबसे अधिक संघर्ष करना पड़ा।

meaning: The choice and use of words and phrases in speech or writing.
definition: The choice and use of words and phrases in speech or writing.
example: The author's elevated diction included many words unfamiliar to casual readers.
exampleHindi: लेखक की उन्नत शब्दावली में ऐसे कई शब्द शामिल हैं जो सामान्य पाठकों के लिए अपरिचित हैं।

meaning: Words that are particular to a specific field of study.
definition: Words that are particular to a specific field of study.
example: Discipline-specific vocabulary in chemistry includes words like 'osmosis' and 'valence'.
exampleHindi: रसायन विज्ञान में अनुशासन-विशिष्ट शब्दावली में 'ऑस्मोसिस' और 'वैलेंस' जैसे शब्द शामिल हैं।

meaning: A definition placed within the sentence itself, making it unnecessary to look the word up.
definition: A definition placed within the sentence itself, making it unnecessary to look the word up.
example: The text used an embedded definition: 'The nomadic, or wandering, tribes moved with the seasons.'
exampleHindi: पाठ में एक अंतर्निहित परिभाषा का उपयोग किया गया है: 'खानाबदोश, या भटकने वाली जनजातियाँ मौसम के साथ चलती थीं।'

meaning: To meet or come across something unexpectedly.
definition: To meet or come across something unexpectedly.
example: When you encounter an unfamiliar word, try to identify its parts before consulting a dictionary.
exampleHindi: जब आपका सामना किसी अपरिचित शब्द से हो, तो शब्दकोश की सलाह लेने से पहले उसके भागों को पहचानने का प्रयास करें।

meaning: A mild or indirect expression substituted for a blunt one.
definition: A mild or indirect expression substituted for a blunt one.
example: The euphemism 'passed away' instead of 'died' is a softer way of expressing the same idea.
exampleHindi: 'मर गया' के स्थान पर 'मर गया' की व्यंजना उसी विचार को व्यक्त करने का एक नरम तरीका है।

meaning: A context strategy where the meaning of a word is clarified through an example given in the text.
definition: A context strategy where the meaning of a word is clarified through an example given in the text.
example: An example clue follows the word 'citrus': 'citrus fruits, such as lemons, limes, and oranges, are rich in vitamin C.'
exampleHindi: एक उदाहरण सुराग 'साइट्रस' शब्द का अनुसरण करता है: 'नींबू, नीबू और संतरे जैसे खट्टे फल, विटामिन सी से भरपूर होते हैं।'

meaning: To be or give a typical example of something.
definition: To be or give a typical example of something.
example: The author exemplified the word's meaning by using it in three different sentences.
exampleHindi: लेखक ने तीन अलग-अलग वाक्यों में शब्द का उपयोग करके उसके अर्थ का उदाहरण दिया है।

meaning: Direct, clear teaching of vocabulary where words and their meanings are formally taught.
definition: Direct, clear teaching of vocabulary where words and their meanings are formally taught.
example: Explicit instruction in vocabulary works best for high-priority academic words.
exampleHindi: शब्दावली में स्पष्ट निर्देश उच्च प्राथमिकता वाले शैक्षणिक शब्दों के लिए सबसे अच्छा काम करता है।

meaning: Language that uses words in a non-literal sense to create a particular effect.
definition: Language that uses words in a non-literal sense to create a particular effect.
example: Understanding figurative language like metaphors can help interpret unfamiliar expressions.
exampleHindi: रूपकों जैसी आलंकारिक भाषा को समझने से अपरिचित अभिव्यक्तियों की व्याख्या करने में मदद मिल सकती है।

meaning: The overall tone and meaning of a passage that helps determine the meaning of individual words.
definition: The overall tone and meaning of a passage that helps determine the meaning of individual words.
example: The general sense of the paragraph suggested the word 'melancholy' had a sad meaning.
exampleHindi: अनुच्छेद के सामान्य अर्थ से पता चलता है कि 'उदासी' शब्द का एक दुखद अर्थ था।

meaning: An alphabetical list of terms with their definitions, typically found at the back of a book.
definition: A list of difficult or technical words with their definitions
example: The glossary at the end of the textbook helped her understand technical terms.
exampleHindi: पाठ्यपुस्तक के अंत में दी गई शब्दावली से उन्हें तकनीकी शब्दों को समझने में मदद मिली।

meaning: Each of two or more words having the same spelling or pronunciation but different meanings.
definition: A word that sounds or is spelled the same as another word but has a different meaning and often a different origin.
example: 'Bat' is a homonym that can mean a flying mammal or a sports implement.
exampleHindi: 'बैट' एक समानार्थी शब्द है जिसका अर्थ उड़ने वाला स्तनपायी या खेल उपकरण हो सकता है।

meaning: A phrase or saying whose meaning cannot be deduced from the literal definitions of the words.
definition: A phrase or saying whose meaning cannot be deduced from the literal definitions of the words.
example: The idiomatic expression 'bite the bullet' confused non-native speakers unfamiliar with it.
exampleHindi: मुहावरेदार अभिव्यक्ति 'गोली खाओ' ने इससे अपरिचित गैर-देशी वक्ताओं को भ्रमित कर दिया।

meaning: Reading done on one's own without teacher guidance, a key driver of vocabulary growth.
definition: Reading done on one's own without teacher guidance, a key driver of vocabulary growth.
example: Independent reading exposes learners to a wide range of vocabulary in natural contexts.
exampleHindi: स्वतंत्र पठन शिक्षार्थियों को प्राकृतिक संदर्भों में शब्दावली की एक विस्तृत श्रृंखला से परिचित कराता है।

meaning: Specialized words or expressions used by a particular profession or group.
definition: Specialised technical vocabulary used within a particular profession or field of study.
example: Medical jargon can be difficult to understand without prior knowledge of the field.
exampleHindi: क्षेत्र के पूर्व ज्ञान के बिना चिकित्सा शब्दजाल को समझना मुश्किल हो सकता है।

meaning: Using a newly learned word in a real-world context to reinforce understanding.
definition: Using a newly learned word in a real-world context to reinforce understanding.
example: Meaningful use of new words â€” in writing and conversation â€” accelerates retention.
exampleHindi: नए शब्दों का सार्थक उपयोग - लेखन और बातचीत में - प्रतिधारण को तेज करता है।

meaning: A figure of speech in which a word is applied to something it does not literally apply to.
definition: A figure of speech that describes something by saying it is something else, implying a comparison
example: The metaphor 'time is a thief' helped clarify the meaning of 'ephemeral' in the passage.
exampleHindi: रूपक 'समय एक चोर है' ने परिच्छेद में 'क्षणभंगुर' के अर्थ को स्पष्ट करने में मदद की।

meaning: Not clearly expressed or understood; not well known.
definition: Not clearly expressed or understood; not well known.
example: The essay used several obscure terms that required dictionary consultation.
exampleHindi: निबंध में कई अस्पष्ट शब्दों का इस्तेमाल किया गया था जिसके लिए शब्दकोश परामर्श की आवश्यकता थी।

meaning: A word, phrase, or clause inserted into a sentence as an explanation or aside, set off by brackets or commas.
definition: A word, phrase, or clause inserted into a sentence as an explanation or aside, set off by brackets or commas.
example: The author used a parenthetical â€” (meaning excessive pride) â€” to define 'hubris' immediately.
exampleHindi: लेखक ने तुरंत 'अभिमान' को परिभाषित करने के लिए कोष्ठक - (जिसका अर्थ है अत्यधिक गर्व) - का उपयोग किया।

meaning: The coexistence of many possible meanings for a word or phrase.
definition: The coexistence of multiple meanings for a single word or phrase
example: The polysemy of 'bank' â€” financial institution or riverbank â€” can cause confusion without context.
exampleHindi: 'बैंक' का बहुरूपिया - वित्तीय संस्थान या नदी तट - संदर्भ के बिना भ्रम पैदा कर सकता है।

meaning: The way in which a word is pronounced.
definition: The way in which a word or language is spoken
example: Correct pronunciation of a word can sometimes trigger recognition of its meaning.
exampleHindi: किसी शब्द का सही उच्चारण कभी-कभी उसके अर्थ की पहचान को ट्रिगर कर सकता है।

meaning: A context strategy where punctuation such as dashes, colons, or parentheses signal a definition follows.
definition: A context strategy where punctuation such as dashes, colons, or parentheses signal a definition follows.
example: A punctuation clue appears in: 'He suffered from insomnia â€” the inability to sleep â€” for months.'
exampleHindi: इसमें एक विराम चिह्न दिखाई देता है: 'वह अनिद्रा से पीड़ित था - सोने में असमर्थता - महीनों तक।'

meaning: To speak written text out loud, which can help with recognition and comprehension of unfamiliar words.
definition: To speak written text out loud, which can help with recognition and comprehension of unfamiliar words.
example: Reading aloud helped her notice the unfamiliar word within its sentence clearly.
exampleHindi: ज़ोर से पढ़ने से उसे वाक्य के भीतर अपरिचित शब्द को स्पष्ट रूप से नोटिस करने में मदद मिली।

meaning: The ability to read accurately, quickly, and with proper expression.
definition: The ability to read accurately, quickly, and with proper expression.
example: Developing reading fluency helps readers focus on meaning rather than decoding individual words.
exampleHindi: पढ़ने का प्रवाह विकसित करने से पाठकों को अलग-अलग शब्दों को डिकोड करने के बजाय अर्थ पर ध्यान केंद्रित करने में मदद मिलती है।

meaning: The practice of reading a broad range of texts to build vocabulary and world knowledge.
definition: The practice of reading a broad range of texts to build vocabulary and world knowledge.
example: Reading widely across genres and subjects is the most effective long-term vocabulary strategy.
exampleHindi: विभिन्न शैलियों और विषयों को व्यापक रूप से पढ़ना सबसे प्रभावी दीर्घकालिक शब्दावली रणनीति है।

meaning: A variety of language used for a particular purpose or in a particular social setting.
definition: The style or level of formality in language use, which varies depending on the social context and audience.
example: The formal register of the legal document included many unfamiliar vocabulary terms.
exampleHindi: कानूनी दस्तावेज़ के औपचारिक रजिस्टर में कई अपरिचित शब्दावली शब्द शामिल थे।

meaning: The strategy of reading a passage again to improve understanding.
definition: The strategy of reading a passage again to improve understanding.
example: Rereading the paragraph helped him make a better inference about the word 'tenacious'.
exampleHindi: पैराग्राफ को दोबारा पढ़ने से उन्हें 'दृढ़' शब्द के बारे में बेहतर अनुमान लगाने में मदद मिली।

meaning: A context clue in which the author restates a difficult word in simpler terms nearby.
definition: A context clue in which the author restates a difficult word in simpler terms nearby.
example: The text offered a restatement: 'the arid, or extremely dry, landscape stretched for miles.'
exampleHindi: पाठ ने एक पुनर्कथन प्रस्तुत किया: 'शुष्क, या अत्यंत शुष्क, परिदृश्य मीलों तक फैला हुआ है।'

meaning: Relating to the meaning of words and language.
definition: Relating to meaning in language or logic.
example: Semantic clues in a paragraph can help readers guess the meaning of unfamiliar vocabulary.
exampleHindi: किसी पैराग्राफ में अर्थ संबंधी सुराग पाठकों को अपरिचित शब्दावली के अर्थ का अनुमान लगाने में मदद कर सकते हैं।

meaning: A group of words that all relate to the same concept or subject area.
definition: A group of words that all relate to the same concept or subject area.
example: Words like 'fearful', 'anxious', and 'terrified' belong to the semantic field of fear.
exampleHindi: 'भयभीत', 'चिंतित' और 'भयभीत' जैसे शब्द भय के शब्दार्थ क्षेत्र से संबंधित हैं।

meaning: A word or phrase that provides clues about the relationship between ideas in a text.
definition: A word or phrase that provides clues about the relationship between ideas in a text.
example: Signal words like 'however' and 'therefore' help readers understand how ideas connect.
exampleHindi: 'हालांकि' और 'इसलिए' जैसे संकेत शब्द पाठकों को यह समझने में मदद करते हैं कि विचार कैसे जुड़ते हैं।

meaning: A plan or method for achieving a particular goal.
example: Using a combination of context, etymology, and inference is an effective vocabulary strategy.
exampleHindi: संदर्भ, व्युत्पत्ति और अनुमान के संयोजन का उपयोग करना एक प्रभावी शब्दावली रणनीति है।

meaning: The sentences or paragraphs immediately before and after an unknown word.
definition: The sentences or paragraphs immediately before and after an unknown word.
example: Reading the surrounding text carefully helped her figure out that 'avaricious' meant greedy.
exampleHindi: आसपास के पाठ को ध्यान से पढ़ने से उसे यह पता लगाने में मदद मिली कि 'लोभी' का मतलब लालची होता है।

meaning: Relating to a particular subject, art, or craft; requiring special knowledge.
definition: Relating to a particular subject, art, or craft; requiring special knowledge.
example: Technical vocabulary in a science textbook often requires contextual reading strategies.
exampleHindi: विज्ञान की पाठ्यपुस्तक में तकनीकी शब्दावली के लिए अक्सर प्रासंगिक पढ़ने की रणनीतियों की आवश्यकता होती है।

meaning: The state of not being sure or confident about something.
definition: The state of not being sure or confident about something.
example: Uncertainty about a word's meaning can often be resolved by examining the surrounding text.
exampleHindi: किसी शब्द के अर्थ के बारे में अनिश्चितता को अक्सर आसपास के पाठ की जांच करके हल किया जा सकता है।

meaning: Not known or recognized; strange or new to someone.
definition: Not known or recognized; strange or new to someone.
example: Encountering unfamiliar words is a natural part of expanding one's vocabulary.
exampleHindi: अपरिचित शब्दों का सामना करना किसी की शब्दावली के विस्तार का एक स्वाभाविक हिस्सा है।

meaning: A word or expression not previously encountered or understood by the reader.
definition: A word or expression not previously encountered or understood by the reader.
example: She used context strategies to tackle each unfamiliar term in the academic text.
exampleHindi: उन्होंने शैक्षणिक पाठ में प्रत्येक अपरिचित शब्द से निपटने के लिए संदर्भ रणनीतियों का उपयोग किया।

meaning: A word a reader has not previously encountered or cannot immediately understand.
definition: A word a reader has not previously encountered or cannot immediately understand.
example: The reader paused at the unknown word and used context clues to infer its meaning.
exampleHindi: पाठक अज्ञात शब्द पर रुका और उसके अर्थ का अनुमान लगाने के लिए संदर्भ संकेतों का उपयोग किया।

meaning: The body of words known and used by a person or found in a particular field.
definition: The set of words known and used by a person in a language
example: Expanding your vocabulary makes reading and communication much more effective.
exampleHindi: अपनी शब्दावली का विस्तार करने से पढ़ना और संचार अधिक प्रभावी हो जाता है।

meaning: An awareness of and interest in words, their meanings, and how they are used.
definition: An awareness and interest in words â€” noticing them, playing with them, and seeking to understand them â€” that drives vocabulary growth.
example: Students with word consciousness notice and explore new vocabulary independently.
exampleHindi: शब्द चेतना वाले छात्र स्वतंत्र रूप से नई शब्दावली को नोटिस करते हैं और उसका पता लगाते हैं।

meaning: The number of times a person encounters a word through reading or listening.
definition: Each individual instance of encountering a word in reading, listening, or conversation, contributing to its eventual acquisition.
example: Research shows that repeated word exposure across different contexts leads to lasting vocabulary acquisition.
exampleHindi: अनुसंधान से पता चलता है कि विभिन्न संदर्भों में बार-बार शब्दों का प्रदर्शन स्थायी शब्दावली अधिग्रहण की ओर ले जाता है।

meaning: A personal notebook where learners record, define, and use new vocabulary words.
definition: A personal notebook where learners record, define, and use new vocabulary words.
example: Keeping a word journal helped him track and review unfamiliar vocabulary encountered in reading.
exampleHindi: शब्द पत्रिका रखने से उन्हें पढ़ने के दौरान सामने आने वाली अपरिचित शब्दावली पर नज़र रखने और उसकी समीक्षा करने में मदद मिली।

meaning: A visual organizer used to explore a word's definition, synonyms, antonyms, and example sentences.
definition: A visual diagram that shows connections between a target word and its synonyms, antonyms, related words, and example sentences.
example: Creating a word map for 'resilient' helped her connect the new word to familiar concepts.
exampleHindi: 'लचीला' के लिए एक शब्द मानचित्र बनाने से उन्हें नए शब्द को परिचित अवधारणाओं से जोड़ने में मदद मिली।

meaning: The ability to identify written words automatically and accurately.
definition: The ability to identify and understand a written or spoken word instantly, which is automatic in native speakers.
example: Strong word recognition speeds up reading and frees cognitive resources for comprehension.
exampleHindi: मजबूत शब्द पहचान पढ़ने की गति बढ़ाती है और समझने के लिए संज्ञानात्मक संसाधनों को मुक्त करती है।

meaning: The way in which a word is used in speech or writing.
definition: The way in which a word is used in speech or writing.
example: Studying word usage in multiple texts helps clarify the meaning and range of an unfamiliar word.
exampleHindi: एकाधिक पाठों में शब्द उपयोग का अध्ययन करने से किसी अपरिचित शब्द के अर्थ और सीमा को स्पष्ट करने में मदद मिलती है।
